---
editor:
  render-on-save: true
format:
  typst:
    toc: false
    columns: 1
    page-size: us-letter
    mainfont: "Source Serif 4"
    monofont: "PT Mono"
    fontsize: 9.50pt
    margin:
      x: 1.0in
      y: 1.0in
    bibliographystyle: nature
    keep-typ: false
    number-sections: false
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          #set text(font: "Source Serif 4", size: 9.5pt)
          #show heading: set text(font: "PT Mono", weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#4CAF50"))
          #show heading.where(level: 1): it => block(width: 100%)[
            #set text(size: 0.9em)
            #stack(spacing: 0.4em, upper(it), line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.7pt + rgb("#4CAF50")))
          ]
          #set list(indent: 1em, body-indent: 0.5em, spacing: 0.6em)
          #set table(stroke: none, row-gutter: 0.5em)
          #show table: set text(size: 8.5pt)
          #let course(title, level, type, time) = block(width: 100%, inset: (y: 0.3em))[
            #grid(
              columns: (1fr, auto),
              rows: (auto, auto),
              row-gutter: 0.2em,
              column-gutter: 2em,
              [*#title*], [#text(font: "PT Mono", size: 0.85em, fill: rgb("#4CAF50"))[#time]],
              [#text(size: 0.8em, fill: gray.darken(40%))[#level #sym.dot #type]], []
            )
          ]
---

```{=typst}
#v(-3em)
#text(font: "PT Mono", size: 16pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#4CAF50"))[Sumit Mishra]
#v(0.3em)
#text(font: "PT Mono", size: 8.5pt, fill: rgb("#4CAF50"))[
  #link("mailto:sumit.mishra@krea.edu.in")[sumit.mishra\@krea.edu.in] #h(0.3em)|#h(0.3em)
  #link("https://sumitrmishra.github.io")[sumitrmishra.github.io] #h(0.3em)|#h(0.3em)
  #link("https://github.com/sumitrmishra")[github/sumitrmishra] #h(0.3em)|#h(0.3em)
  750-682-4634
]
#v(0.5em)
```

## Fulltime Academic Appointment

**Krea University, Sri City** — *Assistant Professor*, June 2018–Present

## Other Academic Experience

**ICAS, New Delhi** — *Postdoctoral Fellow*, December 2018–May 2019

**IFMR, Sri City** — *Senior Faculty Associate*, April 2017–June 2018

**SHRAMIC, IGIDR, Mumbai** — *Research Associate*, August 2016–March 2017

**SPANDAN, IGIDR, Mumbai** — *Research Associate*, January 2016–June 2016

## Industry Experience

**TCS e-Serve Ltd., Mumbai** — *Assistant Manager*, June 2010–November 2011

## Other Experience

**Mint, New Delhi** — *Consultant*, September 2015–March 2018

## Education

**Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research, Mumbai, Maharashtra**

- PhD, Development Studies, 2018.
- M.Sc., Economics, 2010.

**University of Allahabad, Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh**

- B.A., Economics, Geography, and English Literature. 2008.

## Publications

**Research Areas:** Development Economics, Political Economy, Public Economics.

1. "Does non-farm income affect food security? Evidence from India" (with Andaleeb Rahman). *Journal of Development Studies*, 56(6), 1190–1209, 2020.

2. "Diversity Deficit and Scale-Flip" (with Naveen Bharathi, Deepak Malghan, and Andaleeb Rahman). *Journal of Development Studies*, 57(4), 695–713, 2021.

3. "Fractal Urbanism: City Size and Residential Segregation in India" (with Naveen Bharathi, Deepak Malghan, and Andaleeb Rahman). *World Development*, 141, 105397, 2021.

4. "Residential Segregation and Public Services in Urban India" (with Naveen Bharathi, Deepak Malghan, and Andaleeb Rahman). *Urban Studies*, 59(14), 2912–2932, 2022.

5. "Status inequality and public goods" (with Naveen Bharathi, Deepak Malghan, and Andaleeb Rahman). *World Development*, 176, 106526, 2024.

6. "Reproducibility and robustness of economics and political science research" (with Abel Brodeur, Derek Mikola, Nikolai Cook, et al). *Nature*, 652, 151–156, 2026.

7. "Comparison of Human, AI-Assisted, and Quasi-Automated Approaches to Assessing Research Reproducibility in Quantitative Social Science" (with Abel Brodeur, David Valenta, Alexandru Marcoci, et al). *PNAS* (forthcoming).

## Teaching

```{=typst}
#course("Macroeconomics", "MBA", "Core", "2017–Present")
#course("Advanced Econometrics", "PhD", "Elective", "2018–Present")
#course("Introduction to R", "MBA/PhD", "Workshop", "2018–Present")
#course("Impact Evaluation Methods for Business Decisions", "MBA", "Elective", "2018–Present")
#course("Measuring Impact with A/B Testing", "BA", "Elective", "2023–Present")
#course("Mathematics for Managers", "MBA", "Preparatory", "2017–2022")
#course("Mathematics for Data Science", "MBA & Certificate", "Core", "2018")
#course("Data Analytics with R", "MBA", "Elective", "2020–2021")
#course("Mathematics for Business-II", "BBA", "Core", "2024")
#course("Econometrics for Data Science", "Certificate", "Elective", "2018")
#course("Forecasting Analytics", "Certificate", "Elective", "2019")
#course("Foundations of Development", "MBA", "Core", "2018")
#course("Intermediate Probability Theory", "MBA", "Core", "2018")
```

## Grants and Awards

- IFMR Social Science Fellowship (2024), with Karthik Rao Cavale.
- Krea Faculty Fellowships (2022–2023), with Karthik Rao Cavale.
- IGIDR PhD Fellowship (2012–2016).

## Presentations

- **2024**: 58th Annual Conference of The Indian Econometric Society, Agartala; International Conference on "Recent Developments in Economics Research: Theory and Evidence", JNU, New Delhi; Population Association of America, Annual Meeting, Columbus, Ohio.
- **2023**: SAMVAAD; Annual Conference on Economic Growth and Development, ISI, New Delhi.
- **2019**: Population Association of America, Annual Meeting, Austin, Texas; Development Economics and Policy Conference, DIW Berlin; Nordic Conference on Development Economics, Copenhagen; 1st Conference on Urban Economics and Public Services in Developing Countries, Guangzhou; PEGNet Conference, Bonn; Winter School 2019, Delhi School of Economics.
- **2018**: Population Association of America, Annual Meeting, Denver; Annual Conference on Economic Growth and Development, ISI Delhi.
- **2017**: Global Food Symposium, Göttingen; PEGNet Conference, Zurich.
- **2016**: ADBI-SU Workshop on Urbanization in Asia, Seoul; TIES Conference, Kozhikode.
- **2015**: HDCA Conference, Georgetown University.
- **2014**: IGIDR-ISI Doctoral Workshop, IGIDR, Mumbai.

## Academic Service

### Institutional Service

- Member, Organizing Committee, Research Symposium on Finance and Economics (RSFE), 2019–2023.
- Member, Admission Committee, IFMR GSB Krea University, 2021–Present.
- Member, Ranking and Accreditation Committee, IFMR GSB Krea University, 2019–2022.
- Area Chair, Economics Area, IFMR GSB Krea University, 2024–Present.
- Referee: *Journal of Quantitative Economics*, *India Review*, *Journal of Urban Affairs*, *Review of Development Economics*.

### PhD Students

- Kumar Ashutosh (2020–ongoing)
- Utkarsh Chaudhary (2020–ongoing)
- Mohammed Hashim (2021–ongoing)

### Undergraduate Thesis

- Ritvic Paarekh (2025-2026)

## Skills

### Computation

R, Stata, SAS, Python, Julia. Unix/Linux, Windows.

### Language

Hindi (fluent), English (fluent), Urdu (working).

## Writings in Popular Press

Writing for *Mint*: [livemint.com/Search/Link/Author/Sumit Mishra](http://www.livemint.com/Search/Link/Author/Sumit%20Mishra)

## Personal

Citizenship: Indian

## Contact

References available upon request.
